---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for SDPD
title: "[FEATURE] Brief description of the feature"
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Description
<!-- Clear and concise description of what you want to happen -->

## Motivation
<!-- Why do you want this feature? What problem does it solve? -->

## Use Case
<!-- Describe how this feature would be used -->

## Example
<!-- Provide a concrete example if possible -->

## Alternatives
<!-- Have you considered any alternative implementations or features? -->

## Additional Context
<!-- Any other context or screenshots that help explain the idea -->

## Priority
<!-- How important is this feature to you? -->
- [ ] Must have (blocking)
- [ ] Should have (high priority)
- [ ] Nice to have (low priority)
